name: civic-rezo-backend
description: Backend API for CivicStack - Civic Complaint Management System

scripts.start:python: cd python_services && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python distilbert_emotion_service.py & python gradcam_service.py
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm start" "cd python_services && python distilbert_emotion_service.py" "cd python_services && python gradcam_service.py"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev" "cd python_services && python distilbert_emotion_service.py" "cd python_services && python gradcam_service.py"

author: REZO Team
